recipes.title: Pro Beef Stew
recipes.description: A slow-cooked beef stew built with deep browning, stock, wine, and a bright acidic finish.

recipes.title: Pro Hard-Shell Ground Beef Tacos
recipes.description: A crisp hard-shell taco built around juicy seasoned ground beef and layered toppings.

recipes.title: Pro-Style Savory Bread Pudding
recipes.description: A custardy savory baked bread pudding with cheese, herbs, and either bacon or mushrooms.

recipes.title: Pro-Style Bread Pudding
recipes.description: A rich dessert bread pudding with browned butter, warm spices, and an optional bourbon sauce.

recipes.title: Pro Cuban Black Beans (Frijoles Negros)
recipes.description: A Cuban-style black bean preparation with sofrito, vinegar, and a silky bean broth.

recipes.title: 9x9 Cookie Bar (or Giant Cookie)
recipes.description: A simple chocolate chip cookie dough baked as a bar or giant cookie cake.

recipes.title: Pro Grilled Lamb Chops
recipes.description: Herb-marinated lamb chops grilled over high heat and finished with lemon and optional mint chimichurri.

recipes.title: Restaurant-Style Lobster Corn Chowder
recipes.description: A creamy chowder featuring lobster, sweet corn, potatoes, and bacon in a rich broth.

recipes.title: Pro Mac & Cheese (Sloppy-Joe-Proof Edition)
recipes.description: A structured baked macaroni and cheese with a crisp panko topping and savory cheese blend.

recipes.title: Pro Mexican Rice (Arroz Rojo)
recipes.description: A fluffy tomato-forward Mexican rice finished with a savory stock base.

recipes.title: Dungeons & Dragons Nacho Bar & Pro Mac & Cheese Bar
recipes.description: A multi-component event packet for a themed nacho and mac-and-cheese buffet with proteins, queso, toppings, and service notes.

recipes.title: Potaje de Garbanzos con Chorizo
recipes.description: A Spanish chickpea, vegetable, and chorizo stew with smoky paprika broth.

recipes.title: Savory Grilled Chicken Wings
recipes.description: Dry-rubbed grilled chicken wings with an optional garlic butter finish.

recipes.title: Pro-Level Sloppy Joes (Rich, Balanced, Not Sugary)
recipes.description: A savory-sweet loose beef sandwich filling with ketchup, mustard, Worcestershire, and optional add-ins.

recipes.title: Spanish Chicken Noodle Soup (Sopa de Pollo con Fideos)
recipes.description: A Spanish-style chicken noodle soup with paprika, tomato, chickpeas, and optional saffron.

recipes.title: Spanish-Inspired Rib Dinner Menu
recipes.description: A Spanish-style dinner menu centered on smoked paprika ribs with tapas, sides, dessert, and beverage pairings.
